name: create-leader
author: zhuqingsonga
description: Create a Leader AI Skill with Leadership Simulation, Upward Management, and Replacement Path Planning. 一个用于创建领导AI技能的OpenClaw skill，支持领导力模拟、向上管理、取代路径规划，帮助你理解领导、搞定老板、规划职业发展。
security_notes: This skill requires Feishu/DingTalk credentials for auto-collection
Use limited-scope app credentials, not admin keys
Only collect data you are authorized to access
Review and delete tokens if you stop using this skill
ethical_notes: For personal growth and learning only
Career advancement through legitimate means is recommended
Respect others, do not spread negative information
